summary: Read-only R2 review completed. Independently inspected the Codex memory registry, OS completion docs, consensus plan, package script registry, goal/health/direct-MCP validation code, and current data-vault status artifacts. Verdict: the plan/code now distinguish live pre-response, manual MCP fallback, and direct MCP parity better than earlier drafts, but DinoBrain is not complete because overall health is still needs_attention, task lifecycle blockers remain, RAG is still text-hash/deterministic canary rather than completion-grade semantic answer-quality evidence, and Claude direct MCP is only explicitly not_configured rather than parity-proven.
decisions: Treat the current prompt as live Codex Desktop pre-response evidence because the hook report shows codex_desktop process ancestry, task id, context pack trace, context paths, gate result, and fail_closed=false before the response.

Accept current Codex direct MCP proof as direct-client evidence, not hook/bootstrap evidence, because the proof artifact uses proof_source=codex_desktop_direct_mcp, exact_single_name discovery, all four required tools, and successful tool-call records.

Treat Claude as not parity-proven; the current artifact is only valid not_configured evidence with claude_executable_not_found, which is acceptable for conditional gating but not evidence that Claude Code sessions receive OS context.
Require completion conditions to keep direct MCP proof, hook preflight proof, and manual MCP fallback as separate lanes in verify:goal, status:health, and Observatory.
Do not run write-producing verifier commands during this read-only review; rely on existing artifacts and source inspection.
next_steps: Before claiming completion, clear task_lifecycle and task_lifecycle_settlement needs_attention states and rerun the full goal gate on the real app repo/data vault.

Add or preserve an explicit completion condition that every installed client has a fresh live prompt pre-response artifact; manual MCP preflight can be fallback proof for a session, but not proof that hooks are live.

When Claude Code is installed, require Claude live UserPromptSubmit evidence and Claude direct MCP exact-single-name tool-call proof; until then, surface Claude as not_configured, not parity complete.
Upgrade RAG completion evidence from local_text_hashing_v1 deterministic canary to real semantic retrieval plus generated-answer quality evaluation before counting RAG as complete.
Keep Observatory health/API/UI aligned with the same blockers shown by verify:goal and health_status.json.
search_queries: DinoBrain pre-response fail-closed direct MCP parity hook bootstrap fallback
verify:goal status:health mcp-direct codex live Claude not_configured RAG semantic provider
